text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing with Mayano
Top Gun...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Remember how I started live
streaming?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Well, I've gotten a lot more viewers lately. My
channel is super popular now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking up her archived streams on my phone, I
see all the evidence I need...

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer A: Maya is such a cutie! Viewer B: I love
you soooo much, Maya! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Passionate comments pop up one after another.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
See? My popularity is rising way up into the
atmosphere! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Anyway! During my next stream, I wanna show a
side of myself I've never shown before!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...But I dunno what I should do. Any ideas?
choice_data_list: How about you stream your training?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I knew you'd come up with something
good!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If I can show everyone just how hard I work, I'm
sure they'll love me even more!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Alrighty then! ☆ Since it's your idea, I want you to
help!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If I get more viewers, I'll start getting more
attention during races...
choice_data_list: Got it. Then we'll film you singing!
Got it. Then we'll film you running!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Great! Time to take off toward the stage! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna land in everyone's hearts! ☆ Time to
start the show here on Channel Maya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer C: Waaaaah! Viewer D: Maya is as
energetic as ever! ☆ Viewer E: Where are you
streaming from?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Thanks for all the comments!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Today, I thought I'd show you guys how I really
practice for concerts!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Filming me today is my steadfast partner, my
trainer! A round of applause, please!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer helps me train and always showers me with
praise! ♪

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer F: I'm so excited! Viewer G: I want to be
your trainer! Viewer H: I'm so jealous!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, you guys! ♪ Anyway, time to get flying!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: One, two! ☆ Sparkle, sparkle! ☆ I! Am! ☆ A lady!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's end things with a final cute shot of me!

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer I: Sooooo cuuuuute! Viewer J: Your
dancing and singing are both fire!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, you're not wrong! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Each time I win a race, I'll knock your socks off
with my winning concert performance! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So you've gotta give me all your support!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Great! It's almost time to take off toward the
track! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna land in everyone's hearts! ☆ Time to
start the show here on Channel Maya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer C: Whaaa! Viewer D: You're all clear for
landing in my heart. ☆ Viewer E: That outfit tho?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ Thanks for all the comments!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Today, I thought I'd show you guys how I train!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Filming me today is my steadfast partner, my
trainer! A round of applause, please!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Trainer helps me train and always showers me with
praise! ♪

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer F: Good luck! Viewer G: I'm rooting for
you, Maya! Viewer H: I wanna switch places with
your trainer!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You guys are too much! Well, time to train!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Finished! What did you think, everyone?

text_block_list.name: Comments
text_block_list.text:
Viewer I: Awesome! Viewer J: You're so freaking
cool!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Well, you're not wrong! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Today, I'm going to show you guys just how cool I
am!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Be careful not to blink, or you'll totally miss
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Maya's motivation through the roof, she
completes her training session much more happily
than usual.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Look at how many new viewers I've got! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So many comments too! I've never received this
many before!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! ♪ It makes me super happy seeing you
smile like that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
All right! I've just got to keep this up and become
even more popular!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm rewarded, Mayano Top Gun
becomes even more invested in her streams.
